title: Simple Voice Chat Admin
description: Join SimpleVoiceChat groups without a password.
body:
# Simple Voice Chat Admin A usefull admin plugin to have some cool features for SimpleVoiceChat. ## Features: - Join groups without entering a password. - Create broadcast group to broadcast your voice to every player on the server. ## Commands : **/adminjoin + /svcjoin** - Join a group without password
**/broadcastvoice** - Create and joins a broadcast group. ## Permissions: **svca.join** - Use /adminjoin or /svcjoin
**svca.broadcast** - Use /broadcastvoice
**svca.*** - Permission for everything
